Thanks for the contribution! A few quick notes before you submit:

- Keep PRs focused on one feature or fix.
- See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full checklist.
- For breaking changes to packages/core/ contracts, call it out explicitly below.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences. What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issue(s)

<!-- "Closes #123" or "Refs #123". If none, say "N/A". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / tooling / CI
- [ ] Breaking change (interface in `packages/core/` or `packages/plugin-sdk/` changed)

## Test plan

<!--
How did you verify this works? Be specific.
Examples:
- Added unit tests in packages/provider-openai/src/*.test.ts
- Manually tested in apps/desktop dev mode with provider X, model Y
- Ran `pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint` locally
-->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes. Drag images or link to a Loom. Delete this section if not applicable. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes
- [ ] New code has tests where it makes sense
- [ ] User-facing changes are documented (README / docs / inline help)
- [ ] If this changes `packages/core/` interfaces, the breaking-change implications are described above
- [ ] If this adds a dependency, the license is MIT-compatible (no GPL)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything else: tricky bits, areas you'd like extra eyes on, follow-ups deferred to a later PR. -->
